message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="luca-palmieri" color="blue" summary="Pointing Steve Schoger to CSS and templates for visual review">
Steve, the implementation is complete and ready for your visual design review. Here are the key files:

**CSS:** The waiting-for component styles are at the end of `static/css/main.css` in `@layer components`. They follow the same patterns as the projects and next-actions components. Please search for "waiting-for" in that file to find them.

**Templates:**
- `templates/waiting_for.html` -- main page layout: heading, two-field add form (title + person), empty state, item list
- `templates/waiting_for_item.html` -- item display: title, waiting-on person, date added, Edit/Received/Delete buttons
- `templates/waiting_for_edit.html` -- inline edit form: two inputs (title + person), Save/Cancel buttons

**Design decisions:**
- Two-field add form with stacked layout (title field on top, person field + Add button on bottom row)
- Item display shows title prominently, waiting-on person as secondary text, date as tertiary
- Action buttons follow the same visual pattern as Projects (Edit link, action buttons)
- Empty state uses the same `.waiting-for__empty-state` pattern as other list pages
- BEM naming convention: `.waiting-for`, `.waiting-for__add`, `.waiting-for-item`, `.waiting-for-item__content`, etc.

Please read the CSS and templates and let me know if there are visual hierarchy, spacing, typography, or consistency issues.
</teammate-message>

content.text: I already reviewed all of these files before sending my approval. Let me confirm that to Luca.

input.content: Already reviewed all three templates and the CSS -- my approval message was sent before this one arrived. No blocking issues. The visual design is clean and consistent with the established patterns. You have my consensus approval.

routing.content: Already reviewed all three templates and the CSS -- my approval message was sent before this one arrived. No blocking issues. The visual design is clean and consistent with the established patterns. You have my consensus approval.

content.text: Standing by. My review is complete and approval has been sent. Waiting for the team to reach 9/9 consensus so Luca can commit and push.
